Gear Aid Sea Buff Dive Mask Visor Cleaner Anti-Fog Lens Water Sport - 1.25oz

Diving or snorkeling with a foggy mask is no fun. But before you can treat a dive mask or snorkeling mask with Sea Gold anti-fog treatment, you need to clean it with Sea Buff Dive Mask Precleaner by .

Key Features

  • Dive mask pre-cleaner and slate cleaner
  • Removes residue left on new dive mask lenses by the manufacturing process
  • Lens cleaner removes dirt, sunscreens, algae and other debris
  • Prepares the surface for the first application of Sea Gold anti-fog formula
  • Cleans slates without harming or scratching

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 40835-699
  • UPC: 637641967425
  • Size: 1.25 oz

Our special, quick-clean formula removes the silicone residue left by the factory on new dive mask lenses. Plus, the lens cleaner in Sea Buff takes care of dirt, sunscreens, algae and other debris that can interfere with anti-fog treatments. Just apply, rub, rinse and repeat.

Keep your dive masks clean and ready for anti-fog treatment. Pre-cleaning with Sea Buff is step one to the clearest underwater vision and the best underwater adventures.
